name: Alaska Airlines Atmos™ Ascent Visa Signature® Card

welcome_offer.description: Atmos Rewards Ascent Visa Signature: get 70,000 bonus points and a $99 Companion Fare (plus taxes and fees from $23) after spending $2,500 or more on purchases within the first 90 days of opening your account.
notes: Official Bank of America product/search result shows current Ascent public offer: 70,000 bonus points + $99 Companion Fare after $2,500/90 days.
Replaces stale/expired 2026-06-30 Alaska offer values; no current public expiry date was visible in fetched/searchable issuer evidence.

earning_rates.notes: Earn 3 miles per $1 spent on eligible Alaska Airlines purchases.
Earn 1 mile per $1 spent on all other purchases.

other_benefits: First Checked Bag Free (for you and up to 6 guests)

sources.notes: Official Bank of America Ascent page; 70k + $99 Companion Fare after $2,500/90 days.
Official Alaska Atmos Ascent card page.
Secondary report on July 2026 Atmos offer refresh.

rules.description: Bank of America may be less likely to approve applicants who have opened 5 or more new credit cards in the past 24 months.

recurring_credits.name: Alaska Lounge+ Membership Discount
recurring_credits.description: $100 off annual Alaska Lounge+ Membership ($795 value)

recurring_credits.name: Inflight Purchase Rebate
recurring_credits.description: 20% back on Alaska Airlines inflight purchases

recurring_credits.name: TSA PreCheck/Global Entry Credit
recurring_credits.description: Up to $120 statement credit for TSA PreCheck or Global Entry
